channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: On round about many large pot holes, 16th April
item.description:
The round about has many large deep pot holes on the road surrounding it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bath Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing No Cycling Sign, 16th April
item.description:
This footpath was always a no cycling footpath and has a staggered barrier to deter cyclists from staying mounted however it has been reported to us that children are cycling along here and the old sign is missing. Please could a new sign be erected to show you should not ride your bike along the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Vicarage Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 16th April
item.description:
FW pothole 600mm x 300mm x 28mm Give and take TM Outside number 21 (FW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 16th April
item.description:
FW pothole 600mm x 300mm x 30mm Give and take TM Outside number 21 (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: What’s going on?, 16th April
item.description:
Is work taking place or is it delayed please? The current access restrictions have now expired and residents want to know subcontractors intentions urgently please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Albert Place, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 16th April
item.description:
Traffic lights are out completely as you are going around the roundabout
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 16th April
item.description:
Police handing over report from member of public - traffic lights on A40 parallel with GCHQ and on approach to Arle Court RAB are 'off.'
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: The footbridge on AGO26 over Dean Brook is obstructed and difficult to use. The path between the bridge and AGO25 is across a cropped field and unmarked at the AGO25 junction., 16th April
item.description:
AGO26 Gotherington

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Access to AGO25 from Cleeve Road is difficult, it is then obstructed by new fence on cycle path. Impassable at next field boundary, 16th April
item.description:
Cleeve Road, Gotheringron. W3W tigers.tungsten.cheaper and vase.bands.tidy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleeve Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 16th April
item.description:
Email received 09/04/2026 - copy attached. Customer complaint in respect of blocked drains at the location.
Report on FixMyStreet
